---
title: "Dog and Cat Classifier"
author: "Nicholas Huang"
date: "2025-05-25"
categories: [fastai, deep learning]
image: "cat vs dog.jpg"
---

# Try out my dog vs cat classifier: [Dog and cat classifier](https://huggingface.co/spaces/nichbane/cvd)

This project was inspired by the first lesson in the Fastai course.<br>
This was my first introduction to the Fastai library, Gradio and Hugging Faces.

It was definitely intimidating and frustrating learning about these new resources as well as trying to relearn git and linux for my own sake.<br>
However, it was very satisfying to get it all working.

It is amazing that this was the result of very few lines of code.

The process to creating this definitely took longer than expected and showed me I have a lot to learn when it comes to data science and programming in general but I'm happy to have gotten started!
